metadata.description: Complete biblical genealogy from Adam to Jesus with dual-calendar dating (Zadok Year 0 = 4004 BC), relational data, lineage tracking, and classification system. Data organized by biblical era for improved maintainability.
metadata.calendar_info: Zadok Year 0 corresponds to -4004 Gregorian (4004 BC). Add 4004 to Zadok year to get Gregorian year.

seth_line.name: Line of Seth (The Godly Line)
seth_line.description: The line through which God's covenant was preserved through the Flood to Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, and ultimately Jesus

jesus_line.name: Jesus's Genealogy
jesus_line.description: Direct line from Adam through Seth, Noah, Shem, Abraham, Isaac, Jacob, Judah, David to Jesus

cain_line.name: Line of Cain (The Ungodly Line)
cain_line.description: Cain's descendants, representing human civilization apart from God, judged in the Flood

ham_line.name: Line of Ham (Noahic Covenant)
ham_line.description: Post-Flood lineage of Canaan, representing nations under the Noahic covenant

antediluvian.name: Antediluvian Age
antediluvian.description: From creation of Adam to the Great Flood

patriarchal.name: Patriarchal Age
patriarchal.description: From post-Flood patriarchs through the Egyptian sojourn to the Conquest

conquest_judges.name: Conquest & Judges Period
conquest_judges.description: From the Conquest of Canaan through the Judges to establishment of the monarchy

divided_kingdom.name: Divided Kingdom
divided_kingdom.description: From the division of Solomon's kingdom through the fall of Judah to exile

exile_return.name: Exile & Return
exile_return.description: The Babylonian exile through the return and rebuilding of the temple

jesus_lineage.description: Direct patrilineal descent from Adam to Jesus through Matthew's gospel
jesus_lineage.note: Path: Adam → Seth → ... → Abraham → Isaac → Jacob → Judah → Perez → Hezron → Ram → Amminadab → Nahshon → Salmon → Boaz → Obed → Jesse → David → Solomon → Rehoboam → ... → Jesus (Matthew 1:1-17, Luke 3:23-38)

davidic_covenant.description: The covenant established with David that his throne would be established forever, fulfilled in Jesus

kinsman_redeemer_type.description: Boaz as a type of Christ, redeeming Ruth as Christ redeems the church
